sectionOrderRules: Hero must include the brand name, the core promise and a primary CTA pointing to /produkter.
Product grid must show concrete products with image, name and price when available - never placeholder cards.
Value props must connect to the brand promise, not generic 'fast shipping' filler unless the brand actually offers it.
Products intro must explain what unifies the range, not generic 'welcome to our shop' copy.
Product grid items must be concrete, not lorem-style placeholders.
Filter bar is optional but when present must reflect actual product attributes (category, size, material).
About story must be specific to the brand and avoid stock-startup language.
Values must be concrete - what the brand actually does or refuses to do.
Phone, email and address must all be present and not be lorem placeholders.
Store locator only when the brand has a physical address.
